title: 2 Pack Shower Body Brushes with Bristles and Loofah, Back Scrubbers Bath Mesh Sponge with Curved Long Handle for Exfoliating Skin, Massage Bristles Suitable for Wet or Dry, Men and Women (Blue & Pink)

features: 【2 IN 1 SHOWER BODY BRUSHES】 Bristle and loofah 2 in 1 shower back scrubber, Use any one side you like. Very conveniently to preparing these two separately bathing items. to rejuvenate the most sensitive skin, improving circulation and skin health.

【FOR WET OR DRY BRUSHING】 The shower body brush effectively cleans sensitive skin, improves blood circulation, relieves stress, makes your skin softer, smoother and healthier. The daily dry brushing also can be used as a cellulite massager.
【BATH BRUSHES WITH LONG HANDLE】14'' Curved Long Handle for Comfortable to Hold, Non-Slip. Extended Handle Allows You to Easily Clean Hard to Reach Areas Such As the Back and the Feet.
【EASY HANGING TO DRY】 Convenient Hanging String and Hanging Hole Design. Just Rinse after Use and Hang the Brush Up by the Rope or the Hole for Drip Drying or Air Drying.

【WHAT YOU CAN GET】 Two bath brushes and two self-adhesive hooks. Our back scrubber is hygienic and fully washable - just hang up to dry. In order to make it easier for you to hang in the bathroom, we presented two hooks as gifts.
description: Product description Double-sided Design： soft loofah and the stiff bristles is a perfect match, provides the ultimate shower scrubber experience. the soft loofah keeps shower gel foaming, gently massages and cleans the most sensitive parts of the skin. the brush head can touch every inch of back skin without dead angle, thick bristles for a deep exfoliator. Ergonomic Handle: 14'' scientific curve long handle with non-slip wavy grip, close-fitting the back, and easily clean hard to reach areas such as shoulder/waist/foot. Excellent Material: It is a vegan bath back brush, made of high-quality pp and nylon, compared to traditional luffa and boar bristle, the loofah back scrubber is easy to clean and dry quickly to prevent bacterial growth, convenient hanging string and hanging hole. Deep Cleaning: The exfoliating dry skin body brushing, using in a bath or shower, helps to eliminate clogged pores and remove dead skin cells, fight dry skin, rough skin, rashes, eczema, back acne, and other skin problems. Smooth Skin: The shower body brush effectively cleans sensitive skin, improves blood circulation, relieves stress, makes your skin softer, smoother and healthier. The daily dry brushing also can be used as a cellulite massager. Specification: Color: blue / pink Material: PP+ Nylon Bristles Handle material: plastic Item Length:14.3in/36.5cm Item Width: 3.7inch/9.5cm Package Included: 2 * Bath Brush (Pink and Blue) 2 * Self Adhesive Hooks (Transparent) Directions [INFERRED] 1. Wet your skin. 2. Apply body wash or gel. 3. Gently rub the brush on your skin. 4. Rinse off soap and dirt. 5. Hang the brush up to dry. Safety Warning May cause injury if used improperly. Avoid use on broken skin. Do not apply excessive pressure. Allow brush to dry completely after each use. Keep out of reach of children. See more
